title: 1.14.4 Piechart Fix
description: Fixes the Minecraft debug profiler piechart in version 1.14.4
body:
Fixes the Minecraft debug profiler piechart in version 1.14.4

In this version the debug profiler (opened by pressing Shift+F3) would not display the subdirectories of the piechart when selecting them via the number keys. This mod fixes that with a simple mixin.

The mod works for versions 1.14.4-pre5 - 1.15-pre4.
